description:
The Accellion enterprise content firewall, kiteworks, prevents data breaches and compliance violations from third party cyber risk. Organizations rely on the Accellion platform for complete visibility, security and control over the communication of IP, PII, PHI, and other sensitive content across email, file sharing, mobile, enterprise apps, web portals, SFTP, and automated inter-business workflows. In this video, learn how Accellion scaled their on-premise development and testing infrastructure using Amazon EC2 Spot instances to improve their developer productivity.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO​

#AWS #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: Accellion kiteworks: Cost-Effective CI/CD Platform Using Amazon EC2 Spot
